title: Sculk Shoot Up!
description:
A sculk décor mod that adds new sculk foliage!!
A SHOOT UP IS A GROUP OF MUSHROOMS ISTG!!!!!
body:
![Titlecard reading "Sculk Shoot Up"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98b95cbe811bc7f54e2cefe969346d9f2a248796_0.webp)

## Overview
Sculk shoot up is a mod that includes many new foliage blocks to minecraft; these include:
- Bubbly Sculk Tendrils
- Grasping Sculk Leavings
- Voracious Sculk Jaw
- Sculk Mycota
- Sculk Bulb
- Wrapping Sculk Leavings

This mod also allows for the use of sculk blocks in flower pots - for example; sculk catalysts -  as well as everything created in this mod

## Features as of right now!
All of these features can be found in / relating to a deep dark

### The Bubbly Sculk Tendrils
These tendrils hold a small bubble, upon right clicking the tendrils, the bubble will pop off, allowing for player use. 

On use of the bubble, If out of water it will half all potion effects, Whereas if used inside of water, it will fully refill your breath bar. 

In order to refresh a tendril, you will need to have it in the presence of a somewhat large experience orb.

### Flower Pots
By placing the block form of a sculk foliage block into a pot, you can gain a very cute little potted sculk friend!!
![A footer saying "This is just a taster of what there is to find in the depths of the abyss...   Take a jump in and see what curses you find!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5bcf8b0b8fb48b4c4401fa49be2c190a8305a1_0.webp)
